race.comment: ASTERN EFFORT (1) has recorded five straight minor placings, the latest over 1350m at Doomben in what has turned out to be a strong form race. The wide draw isn't quite so bad after the scratchings. Suited by the small field and this is his big chance to grab an overdue win. The query runner is SWING STATE (6) first-up from a 23-week spell. Raced three times in the maiden prep, all at the NSW provincials, and improved at each outing. Market the best guide. DON'T DOUBT MISSY (9) has started her career in good style, chalking up a third straight minor placing last start over this distance at the Sunshine Coast. Gets back then winds up so having just six opponents suits her pattern. Major contender. BOMB PERIGNON (8) stepped up quickly to 1400m last start and did a reasonable job at Doomben. Better for that outing and is not out of contention. SHE CAN SOAR (12) is trialling well and should be thereabouts first-up from a spell.
